_comment: CSRF token lifetime + dashboard refresh cadence. The server mints tokens valid for tokenTtlMs and sends both the token and refreshIntervalMs to the dashboard on GET /api/csrf-token. The dashboard sets a setInterval(refreshCsrfToken, refreshIntervalMs) so auto-fired POSTs (background pool-history scans, silent position refreshes, etc.) never hit a 403 on long-running servers (e.g. Raspberry Pi 5 during a multi-hour phase-2 event scan). refreshIntervalMs MUST be < tokenTtlMs; keep at least 10 minutes of margin to survive clock skew and a slow token fetch. Change either value here and restart the server; no client code change needed.
